domain_goal: Expand AI infrastructure coverage across training, inference, orchestration, data/RAG, evaluation, security/governance/cost, hardware, and network/storage/cluster infrastructure while reusing local evidence before new crawling.

coverage_gaps.title: KServe InferenceService autoscaling and canary source capture
coverage_gaps.source: bounded local and external source probe
coverage_gaps.blocked_reason: Local duplicate checks found no existing KServe-specific autoscaling/canary coverage, and bounded probes for kserve.github.io and github.com failed with DNS resolution errors in this sandbox. No KServe claims were promoted without reliable primary-source content.

coverage_gaps.title: Inference serving production postmortem and rollback source capture
coverage_gaps.source: bounded local and external source probe
coverage_gaps.blocked_reason: Local SGLang records are incident-shaped operational leads, not complete production postmortems with service impact, timeline, remediation, and follow-up ownership. External source probing was bounded by sandbox DNS failure, so no production rollback or postmortem claims were promoted.

coverage_gaps.title: Exact MLCommons Storage measured-result artifact capture
coverage_gaps.blocked_reason: Local duplicate checks found only MLCommons Storage benchmark-method and result-framework evidence, not an exact measured-result artifact. Bounded GitHub API and raw result probes for mlcommons/storage_results_v2.0 failed in the shell sandbox with Temporary failure in name resolution, so no throughput, ranking, or product/provider benchmark-performance claim was promoted.
